title: Ghosts of Cadia
notes: Direct sequel to Longshot; same protagonist (Sergeant Darya Nevic of the Cadian 217th).

curation.synopsis: Sergeant Darya Nevic cheated death at the hands of the T'au, and the Cadian 217th's sniper is sent next to Parrescum, a world that has to be pried back from the heretic hordes holding it. The liberation is a grinding, street-by-street campaign against the servants of Chaos, and a chance encounter hands Nevic something a war like this rarely offers: the opportunity to settle a debt she never expected to repay. Luck and marksmanship have carried her this far, but Parrescum asks for both at once and keeps the odds for itself. A follow-up to Longshot that puts the same soldier in a dirtier war, seen from the scope end of it.

rating.reason: Weekly-refresh promotion (2026-W30) — release date 2026-07-25, no Goodreads aggregation at detection time; left explicitly unrated.
